title: AI Natural-Language Search (Intent to Structured Query)

tasks.title: Create AiSearchIntentRequestSchema and SearchIntentEntitiesSchema with barrel export
tasks.description:
Create packages/schemas/src/entities/ai/ai-search-intent.schema.ts with AiSearchIntentRequestSchema (query: min(1).max(500), locale optional, .strict()) and SearchIntentEntitiesSchema (ALL slots: locationType, city, destinationId, lat/lon/radius, accommodationType, minGuests/maxGuests, minBedrooms/maxBedrooms, minBathrooms/maxBathrooms, minPrice/maxPrice, currency, minRating/maxRating, hasPool/hasWifi/allowsPets/hasParking booleans, amenitySlugs: string[], featureSlugs: string[], checkIn/checkOut coerce.date). Also export their TS types. Export from packages/schemas/src/entities/ai/index.ts barrel.

TEST FILE: packages/schemas/src/entities/ai/ai-search-intent.schema.test.ts
Required assertions (§8.1, AC-5):
- AiSearchIntentRequestSchema: empty query rejected, query >500 chars rejected, valid locale accepted, invalid locale rejected, .strict() rejects extra keys
- SearchIntentEntitiesSchema: empty object valid (all slots optional), invalid accommodationType rejected, latitude out of [-90,90] rejected, extra keys stripped (schema NOT strict)
- New fields: minBedrooms/maxBedrooms accept integer ≥ 0, maxRating accepts number in [0,5], featureSlugs accepts string array

tasks.title: Create mapper base with location priority and core field mapping
tasks.description:
Create apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-intent.mapper.ts with mapIntentToSearchParams(entities: SearchIntentEntities, resolvedAmenityIds: readonly string[] = [], resolvedFeatureIds: readonly string[] = []): Record<string, string | string[]>.

Implement location priority (destinationId > geo[lat+lon+radius] > city as q), accommodationType→type, minGuests/maxGuests (conflict: minGuests>maxGuests drops maxGuests), minPrice/maxPrice (conflict: both dropped), currency (only if price present), minRating (clamp [0,5]), checkIn/checkOut (.toISOString().split('T')[0], conflict: checkOut<=checkIn drops both).

TEST FILE: apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-intent.mapper.test.ts
Required assertions (§8.1, AC-2, AC-13):
- Each slot maps to correct output key with string serialization
- Location priority: destinationId wins over city+geo; geo wins over city; city alone sets q
- Conflicting price range (minPrice > maxPrice) drops both
- Conflicting guest range (minGuests > maxGuests) drops maxGuests
- Conflicting date (checkOut <= checkIn) drops both
- currency only set when price present
- Radius clamped to 500 km max

subtasks.title: Create search-intent.mapper.ts file with function signature

tasks.title: Extend mapper with bedrooms, bathrooms, maxRating conflict/clamp logic
tasks.description:
In apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-intent.mapper.ts (SAME file as T-003) add mapping rows for: minBedrooms/maxBedrooms (clamp [0,50], conflict: minBedrooms>maxBedrooms drops maxBedrooms), minBathrooms/maxBathrooms (clamp [0,50], conflict: minBathrooms>maxBathrooms drops maxBathrooms), maxRating (clamp [0,5], conflict: minRating>maxRating drops maxRating). Boolean fields (hasPool/hasWifi/allowsPets/hasParking) emit as string 'true' (not native boolean).

TEST FILE: apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-intent.mapper.test.ts (extending T-003 tests)
Required assertions (§8.1, AC-14, AC-15, AC-16, AC-19):
- entities {minBedrooms:2, maxBedrooms:4} → mappedParams minBedrooms:'2', maxBedrooms:'4'
- entities {minBathrooms:1, maxBathrooms:3} → mappedParams minBathrooms:'1', maxBathrooms:'3'
- entities {minRating:3, maxRating:5} → both emitted as strings
- entities {minRating:4, maxRating:2} (conflict) → minRating:'4', maxRating omitted
- entities {minBedrooms:5, maxBedrooms:2} (conflict) → minBedrooms:'5', maxBedrooms omitted
- Boolean hasPool:true → output {hasPool:'true'}, typeof result.hasPool === 'string'

tasks.title: Update DEFAULT_PROMPTS['search'] with full slot-extraction contract
tasks.description:
Modify packages/ai-core/src/engine/default-prompts.ts (DO NOT create new file). Replace the existing 'search' value in the DEFAULT_PROMPTS record with the full slot-extraction contract from §5.5: complete field list with types, confidence semantics (0=nothing, 1=all clear), 'never invent values' rule, amenitySlugs-from-request rule, featureSlugs-from-request rule, JSON-only output, English field names, refuse redirect attempts. The engine prepends this automatically as `${systemContent}\n\nUser request: ${prompt}` for every generateObject({ feature: 'search' }) call.

No unit tests needed for this file alone — covered by T-012 integration tests (test #1 exercises the full call path with a stub and verifies 200 with expected envelope shape). Confirm the AiFeature type in ai-provider.schema.ts accepts 'search' as a literal.

tasks.title: Create buildSearchIntentPrompt helper with locale-aware allowlist embedding
tasks.description:
In apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-intent.ts (main route file, same module) define the pure helper buildSearchIntentPrompt({ query, locale }: { readonly query: string; readonly locale: 'es' | 'en' | 'pt' }): string. It imports AMENITY_ALLOWLIST and FEATURE_ALLOWLIST from amenity-allowlist.ts, picks the locale dict (fallback to 'es' for unknown locales), deduplicates allowlist values via Set, and returns a string with: [1] amenity slugs line, [2] feature slugs line, [3] empty line, [4] User query: '''<query>'''.

TEST FILE: apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-intent.prompt-builder.test.ts [NEW]
Required assertions (§12 T-004b):
- Returned string contains correct slugs for each locale (es/en/pt)
- User query embedded verbatim (including special chars like quotes, newlines)
- Slug values de-duplicated via Set (no repeats from allowlist)
- Unknown locale falls back to 'es' slugs
- No messages array present — function returns a string, not an object

tasks.title: Create search-intent route handler with middleware chain and generateObject call
tasks.description:
Create apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-intent.ts (main route file). Use createProtectedRoute factory with POST '/', request body AiSearchIntentRequestSchema, response AiSearchIntentResponseSchema. middlewares order: [entitlementMiddleware(), ...createAiRateLimitMiddlewares('search'), createAiQuotaMiddleware('search')]. Handler steps: (1) parse/validate body, (2) await createConfiguredAiService(), (3) call aiService.generateObject({feature:'search', prompt:buildSearchIntentPrompt({query,locale??'es'}), locale:locale??'es'}, SearchIntentOutputSchema), (4) entities = result.object.entities, confidence = result.object.confidence, run SearchIntentEntitiesSchema.safeParse() — on fail treat as {} and confidence=0, (5) determine fallbackToKeyword: confidence < 0.5, (6) return response envelope {intent, mappedParams, confidence, fallbackToKeyword}. Add route to barrel apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/index.ts (create if SPEC-198 did not).

HTTP status codes from §5.1 table must be returned correctly (401/403/429/422/503/502/400).

subtasks.title: Create search-intent.ts with createProtectedRoute and middleware chain
Implement handler steps 1-4 (parse, aiService, generateObject, safeParse fallback)
Implement fallbackToKeyword logic and response envelope

tasks.title: Wire amenity and feature slug-to-UUID DB resolution in route handler
tasks.description:
In apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-intent.ts add two DB lookup steps after entities validation: (1) amenity resolution — if entities.amenitySlugs non-empty, query `amenities` table (deep import from @repo/db/src/schemas/accommodation/amenity.dbschema.js, NOT re-exported from @repo/db index) using inArray(amenities.slug, slugIds), collect UUIDs; (2) feature resolution — if entities.featureSlugs non-empty, query `features` table (check if re-exported from @repo/db or use deep import feature.dbschema.js) using inArray(features.slug, slugIds), collect UUIDs. Pass both arrays to mapIntentToSearchParams(validatedEntities, resolvedAmenityIds, resolvedFeatureIds).

TEST coverage (§8.2, AC-11, AC-12, AC-17):
- Test #10 in integration suite: stub returns entities.amenitySlugs:['bbq'] → mappedParams.amenities contains resolved UUID
- Test #11 in integration suite: stub returns entities.featureSlugs:['river_front'] → mappedParams.features contains resolved UUID
- Unknown slug not in DB → omitted from output (AC-12 pattern)

tasks.title: Write API integration tests for search-intent route (11 test cases)
tasks.description:
Create apps/api/test/integration/ai/search-intent.test.ts [NEW directory + file]. Mount real Hono app via initApp(), use x-mock-actor-* headers (x-mock-actor-id, x-mock-actor-role, x-mock-actor-permissions as JSON-stringified array). Mock AI via vi.mock('@repo/ai-core') for deterministic stubs. touristFreeHeaders: role TOURIST, permissions ['ai.search']. noAiHeaders: role TOURIST, permissions [].

Required tests (§8.2, AC-1..AC-19):
1. Auth+entitlement+high-confidence stub → 200, fallbackToKeyword:false, confidence field present
2. Stub confidence:0.3 → 200, fallbackToKeyword:true
3. No auth headers → 401
4. No AI_SEARCH entitlement → 403 ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED
5. Query >500 chars → 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
6. Empty query → 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
7. Stub throws MODERATION_BLOCKED → 422
8. billingLoadFailed:true in context → 503 SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
9. Stub throws ENGINE_EXHAUSTED → 502
10. Stub returns entities.amenitySlugs:['bbq'] → mappedParams.amenities has UUID (mock/seed bbq slug)
11. Stub returns entities.featureSlugs:['river_front'] → mappedParams.features has UUID

No separate test file needed — these are constants. Verify the file follows the existing WebEvents pattern (exported const/enum). Do NOT add chip-removal events (not in V1 scope).

tasks.title: Create IntentChips.tsx with sessionStorage read, chip render, and removal navigation
tasks.description:
Create apps/web/src/components/ai-search/IntentChips.tsx and IntentChips.module.css. On mount: read sessionStorage.ai_search_chips (guarded with typeof sessionStorage==='undefined' SSR check, wrapped in try/catch for private-mode errors). Render one chip per mappedParams key that has a chip label in aiSearch.chips.* i18n namespace. On chip removal: (1) remove key from active params, (2) update sessionStorage.ai_search_chips, (3) window.location.replace('/[lang]/alojamientos/' + updatedParams). Do NOT render chips for 'q' key (raw keyword). CSS Modules, NO Tailwind.

TEST FILE: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/IntentChips.test.tsx [NEW] — covered in T-020
Required assertions (§8.3, AC-7, AC-8):
- Renders one chip per key in sessionStorage.ai_search_chips (per AC-7)
- Removing hasPool chip removes it from sessionStorage + navigates without hasPool param (AC-8)
- No chips rendered when sessionStorage empty

tasks.title: Create AiSearchPanel.client.tsx with full state machine (anon + auth flows)
tasks.description:
Create apps/web/src/components/ai-search/AiSearchPanel.client.tsx and AiSearchPanel.module.css. Props: {locale:'es'|'en'|'pt', isAuthenticated:boolean, currentUrl:string}. State: isOpen, query, status:'idle'|'loading'|'success'|'error', errorType:null|'quota'|'network'|'fallback', mappedParams, intentChips.

Anonymous flow: on submit → trackEvent(AiSearchLoginPrompted, {locale}) → navigate to buildLoginRedirect({locale,currentUrl}). No API call.

Authenticated flow: (1) trackEvent(AiSearchSubmitted), (2) status='loading', (3) apiClient.postProtected('/api/v1/protected/ai/search-intent', {query,locale}), (4a) fallbackToKeyword:false → trackEvent(AiSearchIntentApplied) + serialize mappedParams as URLSearchParams + write sessionStorage.ai_search_chips (SSR guard + try/catch) + navigate; (4b) fallbackToKeyword:true → trackEvent(AiSearchFallbackKeyword, {reason:'low_confidence',confidence}) + navigate with q=rawQuery + show fallback notice; (5) 403 → show upgrade prompt; (6) 429 → show rate-limit message; (7) 502/503/network → trackEvent(AiSearchFallbackKeyword,{reason:'api_error'}) + show service error + keyword fallback CTA. Use apiClient.postProtected (NOT raw fetch). CSS Modules, NO Tailwind.

TEST REQUIREMENTS in T-020.

Implement anonymous flow (login redirect, no API call)

tasks.title: Write AiSearchPanel and IntentChips component tests (full coverage per §8.3)
tasks.description:
Create apps/web/src/components/ai-search/AiSearchPanel.test.tsx and IntentChips.test.tsx using Vitest + @testing-library/react.

AiSearchPanel.test.tsx required tests (§8.3):
- Anonymous user submits → buildLoginRedirect called, no fetch fired
- Authenticated user submits → fetch called with correct body, loading state shown
- Success fallbackToKeyword:false → window.location.href set with mappedParams, sessionStorage.ai_search_chips set
- Success fallbackToKeyword:true → navigate with q=rawQuery, fallback notice shown
- 403 response → upgrade prompt shown, no navigation
- 429 response → rate-limit message shown
- Network error → service error shown, keyword fallback CTA shown
- Char count updates as user types, submit disabled when empty

IntentChips.test.tsx required tests (§8.3, AC-7, AC-8):
- Renders one chip per key in sessionStorage.ai_search_chips
- Removing chip updates sessionStorage + navigates with updated params
- No chips when sessionStorage empty

Enum-resilience rule (§8.4): use Object.values(AccommodationTypeEnum).length, never literal counts.

tasks.title: Smoke verification: anon gate, chips render/remove, fallback notice, locale
tasks.description:
Manual + automated smoke verification that all major user flows work end-to-end. Covers: (1) anonymous gate — anon user submits → no API call, login redirect fires (AC-10), (2) chips appear and are removable after successful intent extraction (AC-3, AC-7, AC-8), (3) fallback notice shown when confidence<0.5 (AC-3), (4) locale correctness — Portuguese query uses 'pt' locale in API call and pt translations render (AC-9). Review typecheck and lint passes on all new files. Verify 90% coverage threshold met (100% on mapper).

This task is the final quality gate before PR. Run: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test --coverage from monorepo root. Confirm no .only() or hard-coded .skip() in committed test files.
